Home / Services / Vinyl Fences

Vinyl Fences

Low-maintenance vinyl fences for long-lasting beauty and durability.

Vinyl fences are a popular choice for San Diego homeowners who want a durable, low-maintenance fencing solution. Unlike wood fences, vinyl fences won't rot, warp, or splinter, and they never need to be painted or stained. They're also resistant to insects and moisture, making them an ideal choice for our coastal climate. At Inland Fence Inc, we offer a wide selection of vinyl fence styles, including privacy fences, picket fences, and ranch rail fences.

Our vinyl fences are made from high-quality materials that are designed to withstand the elements. They're also UV-resistant, so they won't fade or discolor over time. With minimal maintenance, your vinyl fence will look beautiful for years to come. We offer a variety of colors and textures to choose from, so you can find the perfect match for your home's exterior.

In addition to their durability and low maintenance, vinyl fences are also environmentally friendly. They're made from recycled materials and can be recycled again at the end of their lifespan. This makes them a sustainable choice for homeowners who are looking to reduce their environmental impact.

Our Process

  1. 01 Site Assessment
  2. 02 Post Installation
  3. 03 Panel Installation
  4. 04 Final Inspection

Benefits

  • Low Maintenance
  • Long-Lasting Durability
  • Weather Resistance
  • Environmentally Friendly

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I clean a vinyl fence?

Vinyl fences can be easily cleaned with soap and water. For stubborn stains, you can use a mild household cleaner.

Will a vinyl fence fade in the sun?

Our vinyl fences are UV-resistant and won't fade or discolor over time.

What colors are available for vinyl fences?

We offer a variety of colors, including white, tan, gray, and woodgrain finishes.
